languages.text: В мясистом растении можно разглядеть очертания человеческого тела, плавающего в какой-то жиже.
Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.
languages.original_text: В мясистом растении можно разглядеть очертания человеческого тела, плавающего в какой-то жиже.

traits.locale_text: Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outlines of a human body floating in some kind of ichor.
Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.
You discern the outline of a human body suspended in some kind of sludge inside the fleshy plant. Like a specimen in a tank in some parody of a Magos Biologis chapel.
Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outlines of a human body floating in some kind of ichor.
Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.

languages.text: 肉質の植物の中に、何か泥のような物質に浮かぶ人間の体形が浮かび上がってくる。まるでマゴス・ビオロギス礼拝堂のパロディーのような水槽の中の標本のようである。
languages.original_text: You discern the outline of a human body suspended in some kind of sludge inside the fleshy plant. Like a specimen in a tank in some parody of a Magos Biologis chapel.

traits.locale_text: fleshy plant の中に、何か泥のような物質に浮かぶ人間の体形が浮かび上がってくる。まるでマゴス・ビオロギス礼拝堂のパロディーのような水槽の中の標本のようである。

languages.text: 在这株植物的血肉囊壁里，你能看见一个人形的轮廓，正悬浮在某种液体当中。
languages.original_text: Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.

traits.locale_text: 在这株植物的血肉囊壁里，你能看见一个人形的轮廓，正悬浮在某种液体当中。

languages.text: Bitkinin etli duvarları arasında, bir tür sıvının içinde yüzen bir insan bedeninin ana hatları görülüyor.
languages.original_text: Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.

traits.locale_text: Bitkinin etli duvarları arasında, bir tür sıvının içinde yüzen bir insan bedeninin ana hatları görülüyor.

languages.text: Entre les parois charnues d'une plante, vous voyez une silhouette humaine qui flotte dans une sorte de liquide.
languages.original_text: Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.

traits.locale_text: Entre les parois charnues d'une plante, vous voyez une silhouette humaine qui flotte dans une sorte de liquide.

languages.text: Entre los muros carnosos de una planta, puedes ver el contorno de un cuerpo humano flotando en algún tipo de fluido.
languages.original_text: Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.

traits.locale_text: Entre los muros carnosos de una planta, puedes ver el contorno de un cuerpo humano flotando en algún tipo de fluido.

languages.text: In den fleischigen Wänden einer Pflanze siehst du den Umriss eines menschlichen Körpers, der in einer Flüssigkeit treibt.
languages.original_text: Within the fleshy walls of a plant, you can see the outline of a human body floating in some kind of fluid.

traits.locale_text: In den fleischigen Wänden einer Pflanze siehst du den Umriss eines menschlichen Körpers, der in einer Flüssigkeit treibt.
